base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: reduce tail MAE without materially reducing net profit or trade count
expected_effect: Should test whether the prior successful surgical-veto boundary family can remove or reclassify one additional deep-heat row while preserving the pullback, 1DTE, squeeze, and charm-wall engines. Main tradeoff is possible loss of a small number of high-RSI-slope recoveries; reject if protected fast extended-VWAP winners are materially reduced or net profit falls below 98% of run_029.
label: extended-vwap-rsi-boundary-probe
rationale: Use exactly one surgical-veto family change because run_029 became the leader from a narrow extended-VWAP rejection boundary nudge, while broad hidden signatures retain only 73-84% of PnL and still leave material MAE. The remaining worst tail set is fully covered by the extended-VWAP near-miss family; this experiment extends only the next-nearest missed boundary, not a global entry filter or profile TP change.
strategy_plan_next_experiments: Charm Pin High-Extension Tail Box Refinement
